home.heroSubtitle: A house full of charm in Óbidos
home.heroDescription: Discover unique clothing, handmade tableware, jewellery, gourmet food and more, in a space where every room tells a story.
home.visitUsDescription: We are in the heart of Óbidos, in an old house transformed into a unique space for shopping and culture.
home.artGalleryDescription: On the second floor, discover works by local artists — paintings and sculptures with free admission.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Unique pieces selected with care
shop.availabilityNote: Availability subject to confirmation. Contact us to check.

gallery.title: Art Gallery
gallery.subtitle: We promote local artists at no charge. Paintings and sculptures to discover and acquire.

about.title: The Space
about.subtitle: More than a shop, an experience
about.storyText: Casa da Buganvília is an old house in the heart of Óbidos, transformed into a unique space where every room offers a different experience. With vintage décor, the products themselves decorate the space, creating a warm and authentic atmosphere.
about.musicNote: Music always playing, creating a unique atmosphere.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Come visit us or get in touch
